content:
# Marine Source

**Summary**: Organic matter derived from marine organisms.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2020-usman|Usman, 2020]] identified a marine-source for the organic matter in the carbonate mudrocks.

## Scientific Context

- [[2020-usman|Usman, 2020]] Distinguishes between marine and terrestrial organic inputs.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2020-usman|Usman, 2020]] Analysis of sterane distribution (C27, C28, C29) and Retene content.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- High concentration of C27 steranes and low Retene levels indicate a marine origin. ([[2020-usman|Usman, 2020, p. 83]])
